issue_title: Fix SessionsNewPage title grammar and unify mode labels
issue_body_preview:
## Issue

- resolve: route06/liam-internal#5947

## Why is this change needed?

This PR improves the first-run user experience by fixing grammatical errors and standardizing wording in the SessionsNewPage. The changes are part of a larger UX improvement initiative (route06/liam-internal#5943).

## C
test_description_zh: 访问 SessionsNewPage 页面，观察页面标题的语法表述以及各模式标签（mode labels）的文案是否统一、正确。
expected_result_zh: SessionsNewPage 页面标题语法正确无误，各模式标签文案统一规范，无语法错误或不一致的措辞。
